.file-embed.background: rgb(15, 11, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #906000 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#906000, color-mix(in srgb, #906000 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #906000 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#906000, color-mix(in srgb, #906000 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(15, 10, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(221, 170, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(31, 21, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(15, 11, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(85, 63, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
